tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
    edit "DNS-Resolver-1"
        set subnet 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall address
    edit "DNS-Resolver-2"
        set subnet 192.168.1.2 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set member "DNS-Resolver-1" "DNS-Resolver-2"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-DNS-Resolvers"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 0
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-DNS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-DNS-Resolvers"
        set uuid 788b53f4-3351-51f1-5351-667b8382c733
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Approved-DNS-Resolvers"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set nat enable
next
    edit 3
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-DNS"
        set uuid 789a03d6-3351-51f1-613a-19883a4d60b4
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 3 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}
